mapper.sql: tls.id, tls.real_name, tls.name, tls.suffix, tls.path, tls.type, tls.file_size, tls.operate, tls.create_time, tls.create_by, tls.update_time, tls.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.real_name as ${tAlias}_real_name, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.suffix as ${tAlias}_suffix, ${tAlias}.path as ${tAlias}_path, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.file_size as ${tAlias}_file_size, ${tAlias}.operate as ${tAlias}_operate, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into tool_local_storage (real_name, name, suffix, path, type, file_size, operate, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{suffix,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update tool_local_storage set real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, suffix = #{suffix,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, path = #{path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operate = #{operate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
